scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && python -m venv venv
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && python manage.py runserver" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.test: concurrently "cd backend && pytest" "cd frontend && npm test"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd backend && flake8 && black --check ." "cd frontend && npm run lint"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd frontend && npm run build"
